title: MRI-based prediction of very early recurrence within 1 year after resection of HCC: An international cohort study.
abstract: Very early recurrence (within one year after resection) of hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) indicates aggressive tumor biology and poor prognosis, yet noninvasive prediction tools remain scarce. This study aimed to develop and validate MRI-based models for very early recurrence prediction and explore their biological underpinnings.
